description: General info on a Toki Pona word

__schema0.description: A unique identifier for the word. May have an integer to distinguish words with the same spelling but distinct coinings.

__schema1.description: A unique identifier for an object in Linku. Generally named after the object.

__schema2.description: The latin alphabet representation of the word.

__schema3.description: The author's original definition, taken verbatim in their words

__schema5.description: The source or origin of this glyph, often a URL.

__schema6.description: The source or origin of this object, often a URL.

__schema7.description: Which official Toki Pona book was this word featured in, if any.

__schema8.description: The period of time in which this word was coined, relative to the publication of the first two official Toki Pona books

__schema9.description: When this word was coined, to precision known.

__schema10.description: The name or names of those involved in creating this word.

__schema12.description: The usage data of this word, as described in the Toki Pona Dictionary.

propertyNames.description: A possible translation of the word into English, as listed in the Toki Pona dictionary.

additionalProperties.description: The percentage of Toki Pona Dictionary survey respondents who report this translation as accurate to their usage.

__schema15.description: The most widely used word which is considered to be an exact synonym for this word.

__schema16.description: The ID of an object related to this one.

__schema17.description: The IDs of words related to this one.

__schema18.description: The IDs of one or more objects related to this one.

__schema19.description: Non-Linku resources related to the specific word, such as wiki links.

__schema20.description: A link to the word's page on sona.pona.la, a Toki Pona wiki. May redirect for words with references but no dedicated page.

__schema21.description: A URL pointing to some external resource.

__schema22.description: A link to lipamanka's description of the word's semantic space.

__schema23.description: Ways of representing this word via text/computers

__schema24.description: The sitelen emosi representation of this word, a script for writing Toki Pona using emoji

__schema26.description: One or more example emojis for how the word can be written in sitelen jelo

__schema29.description: A list of sitelen Lasina representations of the word, used by ligature fonts to visually convert latin characters into sitelen pona

__schema31.description: A URL pointing to an image of this word's sitelen sitelen hieroglyphic block

__schema32.description: The UCSUR codepoint for this word.

__schema34.description: The language this word originated from

__schema35.description: The word's usage category, derived from the data of the annual Linku word survey.

__schema36.description: Whether this word is considered deprecated by its author(s).

items.description: Audio files of the words pronounced out loud

__schema38.description: The author of the audio file in `link`.

__schema39.description: A link to the audio file for the word, pronounced by `author`.

__schema40.description: The definition of the word in specific language editions of Toki Pona: The Language of Good

en.description: The word's definition in the English edition of Toki Pona: The Language of Good

fr.description: The word's definition in the French edition of Toki Pona: The Language of Good

de.description: The word's definition in the German edition of Toki Pona: The Language of Good

eo.description: The word's definition in the Esperanto edition of Toki Pona: The Language of Good

__schema42.description: Localized definition on the parent, such as a word or luka pona sign

__schema43.description: The percentage of respondents to the annual Linku word survey who report to use this word, by the date of the survey.

__schema45.description: The IDs of all sitelen pona glyphs which represent the word. The usage category of each fetched glyph may be used to show or hide glyphs.

__schema46.description: The ID of the glyph most commonly used to represent this word in sitelen pona.

__schema48.description: Link to a PNG of the primary sitelen pona glyph for this word.

__schema49.description: Link to an SVG of the primary sitelen pona glyph for this word.

commentary.description: Localized commentary on this word, such as history, clarifications, or trivia.
